name: hg-insights
description: Access HG Insights revenue growth intelligence, account data, buyer intent, technographics, and GTM signals from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use HG Insights revenue intelligence and GTM signals from Codex.
interface.longDescription: HG Insights connects Codex to revenue growth intelligence for market sizing, account prioritization, technographics, spend data, buyer intent, and GTM planning.
defaultPrompt: Find high-fit accounts in HG Insights showing buyer intent and summarize the best sales plays.
Use HG Insights to size this market and identify priority segments for our GTM plan.
Enrich these target accounts with HG Insights technographics, spend data, and buying signals.
